login.title: Log in
passwordReset.title: Password reset
passwordReset.label: User name or e-mail address
passwordReset.hint: Proceeding will send an e-mail that contains a password reset link. Clicking it is going to generate a new password for your account. It is recommended to change that password to something else.
passwordReset.noSupport: We do not support automatic password resetting.
passwordReset.contactHint: Please send an e-mail to {email} to go through a manual procedure.
settings.title: Browsing settings
settings.description: These settings are saved to the browser's local storage and are not coupled to the user account, so they don't apply to other devices or browsers alike.
settings.darkThemeHint: Changing this setting will require you to refresh the page for it to apply.
settings.endlessScrollHint: Rather than using a paged navigation, smoothly scrolls through the content.
settings.postFlowHint: Use a content-aware flow for thumbnails on the post search page.
settings.transparencyGridHint: Renders a checkered pattern behind posts with transparent background.
settings.tagSuggestionsHint: Shows a popup with suggested tags in edit forms.
settings.underscoresAsSpacesHint: Display all underscores as if they were spaces. This is only a visual change, which means that you'll still have to use underscores when searching or editing tags.
settings.hiddenCategoriesHint: Space-separated category names. Posts with tags in these categories will be hidden from search results.
register.title: Registration
register.emailHint: Used for password reminder and to show a Gravatar. Leave blank for random Gravatar.
register.benefitVote: vote up/down on posts and comments
register.tos: By creating an account, you are agreeing to the {link}.
posts.privileges: You don't have privileges to view posts.
post.featurePost: Feature this post on main page
post.videoNotSupported: Your browser doesn't support HTML5 videos.
postMerge.hint: Tags, relations, scores, favorites and comments will be merged. All other properties need to be handled manually.
postMerge.confirm: I confirm that I want to merge these posts.
tag.privileges: You don't have privileges to view tags.
tagSummary.noDescription: This tag has no description yet.
tagDelete.confirm: I confirm that I want to delete this tag.
tagMerge.hint: Usages in posts, suggestions and implications will be merged. Category needs to be handled manually.
tagMerge.alias: Make this tag an alias of the target tag.
tagMerge.confirm: I confirm that I want to merge this tag.
tagCategories.title: Tag categories
tagCategories.name: Category name
pool.privileges: You don't have privileges to view pools.
poolSummary.noDescription: This pool has no description yet.
poolDelete.confirm: I confirm that I want to delete this pool.
poolMerge.hint: Posts in the two pools will be combined. Category needs to be handled manually.
poolMerge.confirm: I confirm that I want to merge this pool.
poolCategories.title: Pool categories
poolCategories.name: Category name
userDelete.confirm: I confirm that I want to delete this account.
fileDropper.orClick: Or just click on this box.
notFound.title: Not found
userTokens.deleteLogoutHint: This token is used to authenticate this client, deleting it will force a logout.
userTokens.deleteAndLogoutHint: This token is used to authenticate this client, deleting it will force a logout.
privileges.viewPosts: You don't have privileges to view posts.
privileges.viewTags: You don't have privileges to view tags.
privileges.viewPools: You don't have privileges to view pools.
privileges.viewUsers: You don't have privileges to view users.
privileges.viewHistory: You don't have privileges to view history.
privileges.uploadPosts: You don't have privileges to upload posts.
privileges.createPools: You don't have privileges to create pools.
help.about.intro: Kagamibooru is an image board engine inspired by services such as Danbooru, Gelbooru and Moebooru.
help.about.registrationText: The e-mail you enter during account creation is only used to retrieve your Gravatar and for password reminders. Only you can see it (well, except the database staff… we won’t spam your mailbox anyway).
help.about.deleteAccount: Oh, and you can delete your account at any time. Posts you uploaded will stay, unless some angry admin removes them.
help.keyboard.intro: You can use your keyboard to navigate around the site. There are a few shortcuts:
help.keyboard.navigate: Go to newer/older page or post
help.keyboard.focusPost: Focus first post in post list
help.keyboard.accessKeys: Additionally, each item in the top navigation can be accessed using a feature called “access keys”. Pressing the underlined letter while holding Shift or Alt+Shift (depending on your browser) will go to the desired page (most browsers) or focus the link (IE).
help.comments.intro: Comments support Markdown syntax, extended by some handy tags:
help.comments.spoiler: marks text as spoiler and hides it
help.comments.siteIcon: adds the site icon next to the link
help.comments.imageSize: You can also specify the size of embedded images like this:
help.tos.intro: By accessing {name} (“Site”) you agree to the following Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, then please do not access the Site.
help.tos.asIs: The Site is presented to you AS IS, without any warranty, express or implied. You will not hold the Site or its staff members liable for damages caused by the use of the site.
help.tos.modifyAccount: The Site reserves the right to delete or modify your account, or any content you have posted to the site.
help.tos.changeTerms: The Site reserves the right to change these Terms of Service without prior notice.
help.tos.minor: If you are a minor, then you will not use the Site.
help.tos.personalUse: You are using the Site only for personal use.
help.tos.noSpam: You will not spam, troll or offend anyone.
help.tos.notLiable: You accept that the Site is not liable for any content that you may stumble upon.
help.tos.cp: Child pornography: any photograph or photorealistic drawing or movie that depicts children in a sexual manner. This includes nudity, explicit sex, implied sex, or sexually persuasive positions.
help.tos.bestiality: Bestiality: any photograph or photorealistic drawing or movie that depicts humans having sex (either explicit or implied) with other non-human animals.
help.tos.mutilation: Any depiction of extreme mutilation, extreme bodily distension, feces.
help.tos.personal: Personal images: any image that is suspected to be uploaded for personal use. This includes, but is not limited to, avatars and forum signatures.
help.tos.ipPolicy: The Site will not disclose the IP address or email address of any user except to the staff.
help.tos.dataStorage: Posts, comments, favorites, ratings and other actions linked to your account will be stored in the Site’s database. The “Upload anonymously” option allows you to post content without linking it to your account – meaning your nickname will not be stored in the database nor shown in the “Uploader” field.
help.tos.cookies: Cookies are used to store your session data in order to keep you logged in and personalize your web experience.
help.searchGeneral.intro: Search queries are built of tokens that are separated by spaces. Each token can be of following form:
help.searchGeneral.specialDesc: filters usually tied to the logged in user
help.searchGeneral.ranged: Most of anonymous and named tokens support ranged and composite values that take following form:
help.searchGeneral.composite: will show things that satisfy either {a}, {b} or {c}.
help.searchGeneral.gte: will show things that are equal to or greater than 1.
help.searchGeneral.lte: will show things that are equal to at most 4.
help.searchGeneral.range: will show things that are equal to 1, 2, 3 or 4.
help.searchGeneral.minMax: Ranged values can be also supplied by appending {min} or {max} to the key, for example like this: {example}.
help.searchGeneral.dateTime: Date/time values can be of following form:
help.searchGeneral.wildcards: Some fields, such as user names, can take wildcards ({wildcard}).
help.searchGeneral.negate: All tokens can be negated by prepending them with {dash}.
help.searchGeneral.sortDirection: Sort style token values can be appended with {asc} or {desc} to control the sort direction, which can be also controlled by negating the whole token.
help.searchGeneral.escape: You can escape special characters such as {colon} and {dash} by prepending them with a backslash: {backslash}.
help.searchGeneral.exampleIntro: Searching for posts with following query:
help.searchGeneral.exampleDesc: will show flash files tagged as sea, that were liked by seven people at most, uploaded by user Pirate.
help.searchGeneral.exampleError: Searching for posts with {query1} will show an error message about unknown named token.
help.searchGeneral.exampleEscape: Searching for posts with {query2} will show posts tagged with {tag}.
help.searchPosts.pool: belonging to the pool with the given ID
help.searchPosts.favCount: favorited by given number of users
help.searchPosts.featureCount: having been featured given number of times
help.searchPosts.type: given type of posts. {value} can be either {image}, {animation} (or {animated} or {anim}), {flash} (or {swf}) or {video} (or {webm}).
help.searchPosts.flag: having given flag. {value} can be either {loop} or {sound}.
help.searchPosts.imageArea: having given number of pixels (image width * image height)
help.searchPosts.aspectRatio: having given aspect ratio (image width / image height)
help.searchPosts.sortRandom: as random as it can get
help.searchPosts.sortCreationDate: newest to oldest (pretty much same as {id})
help.searchPosts.sortLastEditDate: like {creationDate}, only looks at last edit time
help.searchPosts.sortFavDate: recently added to favorites by anyone
help.searchPosts.specialLiked: posts liked by currently logged in user
help.searchPosts.specialDisliked: posts disliked by currently logged in user
help.searchPosts.specialFav: posts added to favorites by currently logged in user
help.searchPosts.specialTumbleweed: posts with score of 0, without comments and without favorites
help.searchTags.name: having given name (accepts wildcards)
help.searchTags.usages: used in given number of posts
help.searchTags.sortRandom: as random as it can get
help.searchPools.name: having given name (accepts wildcards)
help.searchPools.sortRandom: as random as it can get
help.searchUsers.name: having given name (accepts wildcards)
help.searchUsers.lastLoginDate: whose most recent login date matches given date
help.searchUsers.sortRandom: as random as it can get
adminUsers.title: User Management
